# clang trunk: crash in checkAttributesAfterMerging with alias attribute and initializer

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/170060
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-06T02:15:50Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/jGTxdxvnE

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Code
```c
int a[10] = {};
extern int b[10] __attribute__((alias("a"))) = {0};
int off;
main() {
  b[off] = 1;
}
```

---

### Comment 2 - shafik

This crashed all the way back to clang-3.7: https://godbolt.org/z/74xx4sjGn

Instead of using a C compiler use C++ w/ `-x c` and then you have assertions builds all the way back. Some crashes only happen on assertions build and we prefer those b/c they usually indicate the root issue better.

---

### Comment 3 - shafik

Please check for duplicates before posting bug reports

---
